terms.description: The regular income available to the local government during the fiscal year, excluding one-time or special receipts.
Revenue raised within Aparri, such as local taxes, permits, fees, service charges, and local economic enterprise income.
The share of national taxes released to local governments. It is often the largest income source for municipalities.
The share of income that comes from a source such as the National Tax Allotment or locally sourced revenue.

content.sourceNote: Figures are based on the uploaded Aparri ARI and Dependencies 2024 CSV and should be checked against the latest BLGF posting before formal use.
